question_fr: Combien de documents ont été ingérés chaque année ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year AS annee, COUNT(*) AS nb_documents FROM documents d GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre de documents contenant une erreur d’ingestion par année ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year AS annee, COUNT(*) AS nb_erreurs FROM documents d WHERE TRIM(d.error_message) <> '' GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne du nombre de pages selon le type de budget (BP ou BA) ?
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, AVG(d.nb_pages) AS pages_moyenne FROM documents d GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec le plus grand nombre de documents traités ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name AS commune, COUNT(*) AS nb_documents FROM documents d GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY nb_documents DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de documents est en état SUCCESS ?
sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS pourcentage_success FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id;

question_fr: Quel est le total des recettes extraites pour chaque année ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year AS annee, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_recettes FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Recettes' GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Combien de résultats d’extraction sont associés à chaque état du processus ?
sql: SELECT s.code AS etat, COUNT(*) AS nb_resultats FROM extraction_results r JOIN states s ON r.state_id = s.state_id GROUP BY s.code ORDER BY nb_resultats DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents selon le type de masque (M57_CA, M57_CFU, etc.) ?
sql: SELECT d.mask, COUNT(*) AS nb_documents FROM documents d GROUP BY d.mask ORDER BY nb_documents DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, quel est le total des dépenses en 2023, classé du plus élevé au plus bas (top 5) ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name AS commune, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_depenses FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND r.safir_field_id = 'Depenses' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY total_depenses DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Comment évoluent les recettes totales de la commune 'Ville de Concarneau' au fil des années ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year AS annee, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_recettes FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.city_name = 'Ville de Concarneau' AND r.safir_field_id = 'Recettes' GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio dépenses / recettes pour chaque document de l'année 2024 ?
sql: WITH rec AS ( SELECT document_id, SUM(CAST(value AS REAL)) AS recettes FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id = 'Recettes' GROUP BY document_id ), dep AS ( SELECT document_id, SUM(CAST(value AS REAL)) AS depenses FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id = 'Depenses' GROUP BY document_id ) SELECT d.document_id, d.city_name, d.document_year, CASE WHEN rec.recettes = 0 THEN NULL ELSE dep.depenses / rec.recettes END AS ratio_dep_rec FROM documents d LEFT JOIN rec ON d.document_id = rec.document_id LEFT JOIN dep ON d.document_id = dep.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quel est le délai moyen entre la création du document et le lancement de l’extraction, par année ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year AS annee, AVG(strftime('%s', er.start_time) - strftime('%s', d.created_at)) / 3600.0 AS delai_moyen_heures FROM documents d JOIN extraction_runs er ON d.document_id = er.document_id GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Combien de documents sont en état ERROR et possèdent un message d’erreur non vide ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS nb_documents FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE s.code = 'ERROR' AND TRIM(d.error_message) <> '';

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de résultats d’extraction par document selon le type de budget ?
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, AVG(cnt) AS moyenne_resultats FROM ( SELECT document_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM extraction_results GROUP BY document_id ) er_cnt JOIN documents d ON er_cnt.document_id = d.document_id GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leur dette totale augmenter de plus de 10 % entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH dette_2023 AS ( SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS dette FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND r.safir_field_id = 'Dette' GROUP BY d.city_name ), dette_2024 AS ( SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS dette FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND r.safir_field_id = 'Dette' GROUP BY d.city_name ) SELECT d23.city_name FROM dette_2023 d23 JOIN dette_2024 d24 ON d23.city_name = d24.city_name WHERE d23.dette > 0 AND (d24.dette - d23.dette) / d23.dette > 0.10;

question_fr: Combien de retours techniques (is_technical_error = 1) ont été enregistrés par commune ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name AS commune, COUNT(*) AS nb_retours FROM resultfeedbacks rf JOIN extraction_results r ON rf.result_id = r.result_id JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE rf.is_technical_error = 1 GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY nb_retours DESC;

question_fr: Quelle proportion de documents possède au moins un résultat d’extraction avec un message d’erreur, par année ?
sql: WITH docs_err AS ( SELECT DISTINCT d.document_id FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.message_error IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(r.message_error) <> '' ) SELECT d.document_year AS annee, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT docs_err.document_id) / COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id), 2) AS pourcentage FROM documents d LEFT JOIN docs_err ON d.document_id = docs_err.document_id GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 3 communes présentant la plus grande variance des dépenses d’une année à l’autre ?
sql: WITH dep_year AS ( SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS depenses FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Depenses' GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year ), stats AS ( SELECT city_name, AVG(depenses) AS avg_dep, AVG(depenses * depenses) AS avg_sq FROM dep_year GROUP BY city_name ), var_calc AS ( SELECT city_name, (avg_sq - avg_dep * avg_dep) AS variance_dep FROM stats ) SELECT city_name, variance_dep FROM var_calc ORDER BY variance_dep DESC LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Quel sont les 10 documents avec le meilleur score pondéré (Recettes × 0,6 − Dépenses × 0,4) ?
sql: WITH rec AS ( SELECT document_id, SUM(CAST(value AS REAL)) AS recettes FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id = 'Recettes' GROUP BY document_id ), dep AS ( SELECT document_id, SUM(CAST(value AS REAL)) AS depenses FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id = 'Depenses' GROUP BY document_id ) SELECT d.document_id, d.city_name, d.document_year, (rec.recettes * 0.6 - dep.depenses * 0.4) AS score_pondere FROM documents d LEFT JOIN rec ON d.document_id = rec.document_id LEFT JOIN dep ON d.document_id = dep.document_id ORDER BY score_pondere DESC LIMIT 10;

sql: SELECT d.budget_type, COUNT(*) AS nb_documents FROM documents d GROUP BY d.budget_type;

sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_recettes FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Recettes' GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le total des dépenses extraites chaque année ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_depenses FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Depenses' GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio dépenses / recettes pour chaque commune en 2024 ?
sql: WITH rev AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS recettes FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Recettes' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name), exp AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS depenses FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Depenses' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name) SELECT rev.city_name, (exp.depenses / rev.recettes) AS ratio_depenses_recettes FROM rev JOIN exp ON rev.city_name = exp.city_name WHERE rev.recettes <> 0;

question_fr: Comment évoluent les recettes de la commune 'Ville de Concarneau' d'une année à l'autre ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS recettes FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Recettes' AND d.city_name = 'Ville de Concarneau' GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec la plus forte hausse en pourcentage des dépenses entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH dep23 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS depenses FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Depenses' AND d.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY d.city_name), dep24 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS depenses FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Depenses' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name) SELECT d24.city_name, ((d24.depenses - d23.depenses) / d23.depenses) * 100.0 AS hausse_pct FROM dep23 d23 JOIN dep24 d24 ON d23.city_name = d24.city_name WHERE d23.depenses > 0 ORDER BY hausse_pct DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen d'erreurs d'extraction par état du document ?
sql: WITH err_counts AS (SELECT d.state_id, COUNT(*) AS nb_erreurs FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.message_error IS NOT NULL AND r.message_error <> '' GROUP BY d.state_id), doc_counts AS (SELECT state_id, COUNT(*) AS nb_documents FROM documents GROUP BY state_id) SELECT s.code AS etat, COALESCE(err_counts.nb_erreurs, 0) * 1.0 / doc_counts.nb_documents AS moyenne_erreurs_par_document FROM doc_counts LEFT JOIN err_counts ON doc_counts.state_id = err_counts.state_id JOIN states s ON doc_counts.state_id = s.state_id;

question_fr: Combien de documents comportent au moins une erreur d'extraction chaque année ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_id) AS docs_avec_erreur FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id WHERE r.message_error IS NOT NULL AND r.message_error <> '' GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne des recettes par document selon le type de budget (BP ou BA) pour chaque commune ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, d.budget_type, AVG(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS moyenne_recettes_par_resultat FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Recettes' GROUP BY d.city_name, d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leur dette augmenter de plus de 10 % entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH dette23 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS dette FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Dette' AND d.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY d.city_name), dette24 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS dette FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Dette' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name) SELECT d24.city_name, ((d24.dette - d23.dette) / d23.dette) * 100.0 AS hausse_pct FROM dette23 d23 JOIN dette24 d24 ON d23.city_name = d24.city_name WHERE d23.dette > 0 AND ((d24.dette - d23.dette) / d23.dette) * 100.0 > 10;

question_fr: Combien de retours techniques (is_technical_error = 1) sont enregistrés par commune ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, COUNT(*) AS nb_retours_techniques FROM resultfeedbacks f JOIN extraction_results r ON f.result_id = r.result_id JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE f.is_technical_error = 1 GROUP BY d.city_name;

question_fr: Quels sont les 5 documents avec le meilleur résultat net (recettes - dépenses) ?
sql: WITH rev AS (SELECT d.document_id, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS recettes FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Recettes' GROUP BY d.document_id), dep AS (SELECT d.document_id, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS depenses FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Depenses' GROUP BY d.document_id) SELECT rev.document_id, (rev.recettes - dep.depenses) AS resultat_net FROM rev JOIN dep ON rev.document_id = dep.document_id ORDER BY resultat_net DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le revenu moyen par page pour chaque document, et quels sont les 5 documents les plus performants ?
sql: WITH rev AS (SELECT d.document_id, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS recettes FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Recettes' GROUP BY d.document_id) SELECT rev.document_id, rev.recettes / d.nb_pages AS recettes_par_page FROM rev JOIN documents d ON rev.document_id = d.document_id ORDER BY recettes_par_page DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quels documents présentent une incohérence entre la somme des postes D001 et D002 et le total des dépenses ?
sql: WITH somme_parts AS (SELECT d.document_id, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_parts FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') GROUP BY d.document_id), total_dep AS (SELECT d.document_id, CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS total_depenses FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'TotalDepenses') SELECT sp.document_id FROM somme_parts sp JOIN total_dep td ON sp.document_id = td.document_id WHERE ABS(sp.total_parts - td.total_depenses) > 0.01;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent la plus grande variance des dépenses d'une année à l'autre ?
sql: WITH dep_annee AS (SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS depenses FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Depenses' GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year), stats AS (SELECT city_name, AVG(depenses) AS moyenne_dep, AVG(depenses * depenses) AS moyenne_carre FROM dep_annee GROUP BY city_name), variance AS (SELECT city_name, moyenne_carre - moyenne_dep * moyenne_dep AS variance_dep FROM stats) SELECT city_name, variance_dep FROM variance ORDER BY variance_dep DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel classement des communes selon un score composite (0,6 × recettes moyennes + 0,4 × taux de croissance des dépenses 2023‑2024) ?
sql: WITH rev_doc AS (SELECT d.city_name, d.document_id, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS recettes FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Recettes' GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_id), avg_rev AS (SELECT city_name, AVG(recettes) AS moyenne_recettes FROM rev_doc GROUP BY city_name), dep23 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS depenses FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Depenses' AND d.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY d.city_name), dep24 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS depenses FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Depenses' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name), croissance AS (SELECT d24.city_name, ((d24.depenses - d23.depenses) / d23.depenses) * 100.0 AS taux_croissance FROM dep23 d23 JOIN dep24 d24 ON d23.city_name = d24.city_name WHERE d23.depenses > 0) SELECT a.city_name, (0.6 * a.moyenne_recettes) + (0.4 * c.taux_croissance) AS score_composite FROM avg_rev a JOIN croissance c ON a.city_name = c.city_name ORDER BY score_composite DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes qui ont généré le plus de recettes en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT d.city_name,
       SUM(CAST(er_rec.value AS REAL)) AS total_recettes
FROM extraction_results er_year
JOIN extraction_results er_rec
  ON er_rec.document_id = er_year.document_id
JOIN documents d
  ON d.document_id = er_year.document_id
WHERE er_year.safir_field_id = 'Année'
  AND er_year.value = '2024'
  AND er_rec.safir_field_id = 'D002'
GROUP BY d.city_name
ORDER BY total_recettes DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage des documents est en état « SUCCESS » ?
Combien de documents comportent un message d’erreur, ventilés par année ?
sql:

question_fr: Combien d’extractions ont été exécutées selon leur état (PENDING, SUCCESS, etc.) ?
sql:
SELECT s.code AS etat,
       COUNT(*) AS nb_runs
FROM extraction_runs er
JOIN states s ON s.state_id = er.state_id
GROUP BY s.code
ORDER BY nb_runs DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de croissance des recettes de la commune « Ville de Concarneau » entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH data AS (
  SELECT er_year.value AS annee,
         SUM(CAST(er_rec.value AS REAL)) AS total_recettes
  FROM extraction_results er_year
  JOIN extraction_results er_rec ON er_rec.document_id = er_year.document_id
  JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er_year.document_id
  WHERE er_year.safir_field_id = 'Année'
    AND er_rec.safir_field_id = 'D002'
    AND d.city_name = 'Ville de Concarneau'
    AND er_year.value IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY er_year.value
)
SELECT ((SELECT total_recettes FROM data WHERE annee = '2024') -
        (SELECT total_recettes FROM data WHERE annee = '2023')) /
       (SELECT total_recettes FROM data WHERE annee = '2023') * 100.0 AS croissance_pct;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio dépenses / recettes pour chaque commune en 2024, classé du plus élevé au plus bas ?
sql:
WITH dep AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_dep
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN extraction_results yr ON yr.document_id = er.document_id
  JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND yr.safir_field_id = 'Année'
    AND yr.value = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
rec AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_rec
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN extraction_results yr ON yr.document_id = er.document_id
  JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D002'
    AND yr.safir_field_id = 'Année'
    AND yr.value = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT dep.city_name,
       dep.total_dep,
       rec.total_rec,
       CASE WHEN rec.total_rec = 0 THEN NULL ELSE dep.total_dep / rec.total_rec END AS ratio_dep_rec
FROM dep
JOIN rec ON rec.city_name = dep.city_name
ORDER BY ratio_dep_rec DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leurs dépenses augmenter de plus de 10 % entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH dep AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         yr.value AS annee,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_dep
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN extraction_results yr ON yr.document_id = er.document_id
  JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND yr.safir_field_id = 'Année'
    AND yr.value IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, yr.value
)
SELECT d1.city_name,
       (d2.total_dep - d1.total_dep) / d1.total_dep * 100.0 AS croissance_pct
FROM dep d1
JOIN dep d2 ON d2.city_name = d1.city_name
WHERE d1.annee = '2023' AND d2.annee = '2024'
  AND d1.total_dep > 0
  AND (d2.total_dep - d1.total_dep) / d1.total_dep > 0.10
ORDER BY croissance_pct DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le revenu moyen par page pour chaque document en 2024, et quelles sont les 5 meilleures performances ?
sql:
WITH rec AS (
  SELECT er.document_id,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_rec
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN extraction_results yr ON yr.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D002'
    AND yr.safir_field_id = 'Année'
    AND yr.value = '2024'
  GROUP BY er.document_id
)
SELECT d.document_id,
       d.city_name,
       rec.total_rec,
       d.nb_pages,
       rec.total_rec / d.nb_pages AS recettes_par_page
FROM rec
JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = rec.document_id
ORDER BY recettes_par_page DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quels documents contiennent plus de 5 résultats d’extraction avec un message d’erreur ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_id,
       d.city_name,
       COUNT(*) AS nb_errors
FROM extraction_results er
JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id
WHERE er.message_error IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(er.message_error) <> ''
GROUP BY d.document_id, d.city_name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
ORDER BY nb_errors DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne des dépenses totales par commune pour le type de budget BP en 2023 ?
sql:
WITH dep AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_dep
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN extraction_results yr ON yr.document_id = er.document_id
  JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND yr.safir_field_id = 'Année'
    AND yr.value = '2023'
    AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT AVG(total_dep) AS avg_dep_bp_2023
FROM dep;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 3 communes présentant la plus grande variance des dépenses entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH dep AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         yr.value AS annee,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_dep
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN extraction_results yr ON yr.document_id = er.document_id
  JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND yr.safir_field_id = 'Année'
    AND yr.value IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, yr.value
)
SELECT d1.city_name,
       ((d2.total_dep - d1.total_dep) * (d2.total_dep - d1.total_dep)) AS variance_dep
FROM dep d1
JOIN dep d2 ON d2.city_name = d1.city_name
WHERE d1.annee = '2023' AND d2.annee = '2024'
ORDER BY variance_dep DESC
LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Quel est le score composite (0,6 × recettes moyennes + 0,4 × taux de croissance des dépenses 2023‑2024) pour chaque commune, classé par performance ?
sql:
WITH rec AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_rec,
         COUNT(DISTINCT yr.value) AS years_cnt
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN extraction_results yr ON yr.document_id = er.document_id
  JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D002'
    AND yr.safir_field_id = 'Année'
    AND yr.value IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
dep2023 AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_dep_2023
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN extraction_results yr ON yr.document_id = er.document_id
  JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND yr.safir_field_id = 'Année'
    AND yr.value = '2023'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
dep2024 AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_dep_2024
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN extraction_results yr ON yr.document_id = er.document_id
  JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND yr.safir_field_id = 'Année'
    AND yr.value = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT r.city_name,
       (0.6 * (r.total_rec / r.years_cnt) ) +
       (0.4 * CASE WHEN d2023.total_dep_2023 = 0 THEN 0
                   ELSE (d2024.total_dep_2024 - d2023.total_dep_2023) / d2023.total_dep_2023 * 100.0
              END) AS composite_score
FROM rec r
JOIN dep2023 d2023 ON d2023.city_name = r.city_name
JOIN dep2024 d2024 ON d2024.city_name = r.city_name
ORDER BY composite_score DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quels sont les 5 documents dont la durée d’exécution de l’extraction dépasse la moyenne, classés du plus long au plus court ?
sql:
WITH durations AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         d.city_name,
         (julianday(d.created_at) - julianday(er.start_time)) * 86400.0 AS duration_seconds
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_runs er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.start_time IS NOT NULL AND d.created_at IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT document_id,
       city_name,
       duration_seconds
FROM durations
WHERE duration_seconds > (SELECT AVG(duration_seconds) FROM durations)
ORDER BY duration_seconds DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de documents contenant au moins un avertissement, ventilé par type de masque ?
sql:
WITH total_per_mask AS (
  SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS total_cnt
  FROM documents
  GROUP BY mask
),
with_warning AS (
  SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS warning_cnt
  FROM documents
  WHERE warning_message IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(warning_message) <> ''
  GROUP BY mask
)
SELECT t.mask,
       t.total_cnt,
       COALESCE(w.warning_cnt,0) AS warning_cnt,
       ROUND(100.0 * COALESCE(w.warning_cnt,0) / t.total_cnt,2) AS pct_with_warning
FROM total_per_mask t
LEFT JOIN with_warning w ON w.mask = t.mask
ORDER BY pct_with_warning DESC;

question_fr: Quelles communes présentent des documents où plusieurs années différentes ont été extraites (incohérence du champ Année) ?

WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Année'

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de variation des dépenses D001 entre 2023 et 2024 pour chaque commune ?
sql: WITH dep2023 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_2023 FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY d.city_name), dep2024 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_2024 FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name) SELECT d2023.city_name, d2023.total_2023, d2024.total_2024, ((d2024.total_2024 - d2023.total_2023) * 100.0 / d2023.total_2023) AS pct_change FROM dep2023 d2023 JOIN dep2024 d2024 ON d2023.city_name = d2024.city_name ORDER BY pct_change DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio dépenses / recettes par commune pour l'année 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes présentant la plus grande variance des dépenses D001 entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH dep AS (SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_dep FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year), piv AS (SELECT city_name, MAX(CASE WHEN document_year='2023' THEN total_dep END) AS dep_2023, MAX(CASE WHEN document_year='2024' THEN total_dep END) AS dep_2024 FROM dep GROUP BY city_name) SELECT city_name, ABS(dep_2024 - dep_2023) AS variance FROM piv ORDER BY variance DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de pages par document pour chaque commune en 2023 et 2024, et quelles communes ont vu une hausse de plus de 20 % en 2024 ?
sql: WITH pages2023 AS (SELECT d.city_name, AVG(d.nb_pages) AS avg_pages FROM documents d WHERE d.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY d.city_name), pages2024 AS (SELECT d.city_name, AVG(d.nb_pages) AS avg_pages FROM documents d WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name) SELECT p2024.city_name, p2023.avg_pages AS avg_2023, p2024.avg_pages AS avg_2024, ((p2024.avg_pages - p2023.avg_pages) * 100.0 / p2023.avg_pages) AS pct_change FROM pages2023 p2023 JOIN pages2024 p2024 ON p2023.city_name = p2024.city_name WHERE ((p2024.avg_pages - p2023.avg_pages) * 100.0 / p2023.avg_pages) > 20 ORDER BY pct_change DESC;

question_fr: Quels documents présentent une incohérence : la somme des dépenses D001 et D002 diffère de plus de 5 % du total déclaré (champ TotalDepenses) ?
sql: WITH dep AS (SELECT r.document_id, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS sum_dep FROM extraction_results r WHERE r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') GROUP BY r.document_id), total AS (SELECT r.document_id, CAST(r.value AS REAL) AS total_dep FROM extraction_results r WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'TotalDepenses') SELECT d.document_id, d.city_name, d.document_year, dep.sum_dep, total.total_dep, ((dep.sum_dep - total.total_dep) * 100.0 / total.total_dep) AS pct_diff FROM dep JOIN total ON dep.document_id = total.document_id JOIN documents d ON dep.document_id = d.document_id WHERE ABS((dep.sum_dep - total.total_dep) * 100.0 / total.total_dep) > 5 ORDER BY pct_diff DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quel est le classement des communes selon un score composite : 0,6 × moyenne des recettes + 0,4 × taux de croissance des dépenses D001 entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH rec AS (SELECT d.city_name, AVG(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS avg_rec FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'Recettes' GROUP BY d.city_name), dep2023 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_2023 FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY d.city_name), dep2024 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_2024 FROM extraction_results r JOIN documents d ON r.document_id = d.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name), growth AS (SELECT d2023.city_name, ((d2024.total_2024 - d2023.total_2023) * 100.0 / d2023.total_2023) AS pct_growth FROM dep2023 d2023 JOIN dep2024 d2024 ON d2023.city_name = d2024.city_name) SELECT rec.city_name, (0.6 * rec.avg_rec + 0.4 * growth.pct_growth) AS composite_score FROM rec JOIN growth ON rec.city_name = growth.city_name ORDER BY composite_score DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio dépenses (D001) / recettes (D002) par commune pour 2024, classé du plus élevé au plus bas ?

       SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_D002,
       ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END), 0), 4) AS ratio_D001_D002

question_fr: Quel est le taux de croissance des dépenses (D001) entre 2023 et 2024 pour chaque commune ?

WITH d2023 AS (

    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE d.document_year = '2023'
      AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
),
     d2024 AS (

           CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS d001_2024
    FROM documents d

    WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
      AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
)
SELECT d2023.city_name,
       d2023.d001_2023,
       d2024.d001_2024,
       ROUND((d2024.d001_2024 - d2023.d001_2023) * 100.0 / NULLIF(d2023.d001_2023, 0), 2) AS croissance_pct

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leurs dépenses (D001) en 2024 dépasser 150 % de celles de 2023 ?

WITH d2023 AS (

    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE d.document_year = '2023'

),
     d2024 AS (

           CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS d001_2024
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
      AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
)
SELECT d2023.city_name,
       d2023.d001_2023,

question_fr: Quel score composite (0,6 × moyenne des recettes D002 + 0,4 × taux de croissance des dépenses D001) attribuer à chaque commune et quelles sont les 10 meilleures ?
sql:
WITH avg_rev AS (
    SELECT d.city_name,
           SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) / 2.0 AS avg_D002
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D002'
      AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
    GROUP BY d.city_name
),
     d001_2023 AS (
    SELECT d.city_name,
           SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS d001_2023
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2023'
    GROUP BY d.city_name
),
     d001_2024 AS (
    SELECT d.city_name,
           SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS d001_2024
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024'
    GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT a.city_name,
       ROUND(0.6 * a.avg_D002 + 0.4 * ((b.d001_2024 - b.d001_2023) * 100.0 / NULLIF(b.d001_2023, 0)), 2) AS score_composite
FROM avg_rev a
JOIN (
    SELECT d001_2023.city_name,
           d001_2023.d001_2023,
           d001_2024.d001_2024
    FROM d001_2023
    JOIN d001_2024 USING (city_name)
) b ON a.city_name = b.city_name
ORDER BY score_composite DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, quel est le pourcentage de résultats d'extraction qui ont reçu une erreur technique (is_technical_error = 1) ?
sql:
WITH total AS (
    SELECT d.city_name,
           COUNT(*) AS total_results
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    GROUP BY d.city_name
),
     tech AS (
    SELECT d.city_name,
           COUNT(*) AS tech_errors
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    JOIN resultfeedbacks rf ON rf.result_id = er.result_id
    WHERE rf.is_technical_error = 1
    GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT t.city_name,
       ROUND(100.0 * tech.tech_errors / NULLIF(t.total_results, 0), 2) AS pct_tech_errors
FROM total t
JOIN tech ON t.city_name = tech.city_name
WHERE pct_tech_errors > 20
ORDER BY pct_tech_errors DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque année, quelle est la médiane des dépenses (D001) par commune et quelles communes dépassent le 90e percentile ?
sql:
WITH per_commune AS (
    SELECT d.document_year,
           d.city_name,
           SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    GROUP BY d.document_year, d.city_name
),
     thresholds AS (
    SELECT document_year,
           MAX(total_D001) AS p90_D001
    FROM (
        SELECT document_year,
               total_D001,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY document_year ORDER BY total_D001) AS rn,
               COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY document_year) AS cnt
        FROM per_commune
    )
    WHERE rn > 0.9 * cnt
    GROUP BY document_year
)
SELECT pc.document_year,
       pc.city_name,
       pc.total_D001
FROM per_commune pc
JOIN thresholds th ON pc.document_year = th.document_year
WHERE pc.total_D001 > th.p90_D001
ORDER BY pc.document_year, pc.total_D001 DESC;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage des documents est en état « SUCCESS » chaque année ?

question_fr: Quel est le ratio dépenses D001 / recettes D002 pour chaque commune en 2024, classé du plus élevé au plus bas ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         r.safir_field_id,
         SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_val
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON r.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, r.safir_field_id
)
SELECT d.city_name,
       ROUND( (d.expenses / NULLIF(d.revenues,0)), 2) AS ratio_dep_rec
FROM (
    SELECT city_name,
           MAX(CASE WHEN safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN total_val END) AS expenses,
           MAX(CASE WHEN safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN total_val END) AS revenues
    FROM sums

) d
WHERE d.revenues IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ratio_dep_rec DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le résultat net (recettes D002 – dépenses D001) de chaque commune en 2024, et quelles sont les 5 meilleures performances ?

question_fr: Quel score composite (0,6 × moyenne des recettes D002 + 0,4 × taux de croissance des dépenses D001 entre 2023‑2024) attribuer à chaque commune, et quelles sont les 10 meilleures ?
sql:
WITH expenses AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_dep
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON r.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
revenues AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_rec
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON r.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'D002' AND d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
 growth AS (
  SELECT e2023.city_name,
         ((e2024.total_dep - e2023.total_dep) / NULLIF(e2023.total_dep,0)) * 100.0 AS growth_pct
  FROM expenses e2023
  JOIN expenses e2024 ON e2023.city_name = e2024.city_name
  WHERE e2023.document_year = '2023' AND e2024.document_year = '2024'
)
SELECT g.city_name,
       ROUND(0.6 * r.total_rec + 0.4 * g.growth_pct, 2) AS score_composite
FROM growth g
JOIN revenues r ON g.city_name = r.city_name
ORDER BY score_composite DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelles communes présentent, en 2024, un écart supérieur à 5 % entre la somme des dépenses D001 et des recettes D002 et le champ total déclaré (safir_field_id = 'Total') ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         r.safir_field_id,
         SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) AS total_val
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results r ON r.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND r.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002','Total')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, r.safir_field_id
),
combined AS (
  SELECT city_name,
         MAX(CASE WHEN safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN total_val END) AS dep,
         MAX(CASE WHEN safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN total_val END) AS rec,
         MAX(CASE WHEN safir_field_id = 'Total' THEN total_val END) AS total_declared
  FROM sums
  GROUP BY city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       ROUND(((dep + rec) - total_declared) / NULLIF(total_declared,0) * 100.0, 2) AS ecart_pct
FROM combined
WHERE total_declared IS NOT NULL
  AND ABS(((dep + rec) - total_declared) / NULLIF(total_declared,0) * 100.0) > 5
ORDER BY ecart_pct DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de croissance des dépenses D001 entre 2023 et 2024 pour chaque commune ?
sql:
WITH d AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS sum_D001
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT c.city_name,
       ROUND( (COALESCE(d2024.sum_D001,0) - COALESCE(d2023.sum_D001,0)) /
              NULLIF(COALESCE(d2023.sum_D001,0),0) * 100.0, 2) AS growth_pct
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT city_name FROM d) c
LEFT JOIN d d2023 ON d2023.city_name = c.city_name AND d2023.document_year = '2023'
LEFT JOIN d d2024 ON d2024.city_name = c.city_name AND d2024.document_year = '2024'
WHERE COALESCE(d2023.sum_D001,0) > 0
ORDER BY growth_pct DESC;

question_fr: Quels documents présentent une différence supérieure à 5 % entre la somme des dépenses D001 et des recettes D002 et le champ total déclaré ?
sql:
SELECT d.document_id,
       d.city_name,
       d.document_year,
       ROUND( (COALESCE(sum_D001,0) + COALESCE(sum_D002,0) - COALESCE(sum_Total,0)) / NULLIF(COALESCE(sum_Total,0),0) * 100.0, 2) AS diff_pct
FROM (
  SELECT er.document_id,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS sum_D001,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS sum_D002,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'Total' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS sum_Total
  FROM extraction_results er
  GROUP BY er.document_id
) agg
JOIN documents d ON d.document_id = agg.document_id
WHERE sum_Total IS NOT NULL AND ABS((COALESCE(sum_D001,0) + COALESCE(sum_D002,0) - sum_Total)) > 0.05 * sum_Total

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent une baisse continue des dépenses D001 sur les trois dernières années (2022‑2024) ?

         SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er
         WHERE er.document_id = d.document_id
           AND er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error <> ''
       ) THEN d.document_id END) / COUNT(*),2) AS pct_docs_with_error
FROM documents d
GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Quel score composite de risque, combinant la croissance des dépenses et le taux d'avertissements, attribuer à chaque commune et quelles sont les 10 meilleures ?
sql:
WITH exp AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_exp
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
), growth AS (
  SELECT e2024.city_name,
         ((e2024.total_exp - e2023.total_exp) / NULLIF(e2023.total_exp,0)) * 100.0 AS growth_pct
  FROM exp e2024
  JOIN exp e2023 ON e2024.city_name = e2023.city_name
  WHERE e2024.document_year = '2024' AND e2023.document_year = '2023'
), warnings AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND er.message_warning <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*),2) AS warning_pct
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT g.city_name,
       ROUND(0.5 * COALESCE(g.growth_pct,0) + 0.5 * COALESCE(w.warning_pct,0),2) AS risk_score
FROM growth g
LEFT JOIN warnings w ON g.city_name = w.city_name
ORDER BY risk_score DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelles communes présentent, pour une année donnée, des dépenses supérieures à 120 % des recettes, et quel est le pourcentage d'excès ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_exp,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_rev
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT city_name,
       document_year,
       total_exp,
       total_rev,
       ROUND((total_exp / NULLIF(total_rev,0) - 1) * 100.0,2) AS excess_pct
FROM sums
WHERE total_rev > 0 AND total_exp > 1.2 * total_rev
ORDER BY excess_pct DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le revenu médian (champ D001) par masque pour l'année 2024 ?
sql:
WITH expenses AS (
  SELECT d.mask,
         CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS expense,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY d.mask ORDER BY CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY d.mask) AS cnt
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024'
)
SELECT mask,
       AVG(expense) AS median_expense
FROM expenses
WHERE rn IN ( (cnt+1)/2 , (cnt+2)/2 )
GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes où le nombre d'avertissements d'extraction a le plus augmenté entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH warn_counts AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.document_year,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND er.message_warning <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warn_cnt
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
), diff AS (
  SELECT w2024.city_name,
         w2024.warn_cnt - COALESCE(w2023.warn_cnt,0) AS warning_increase
  FROM warn_counts w2024
  LEFT JOIN warn_counts w2023
    ON w2024.city_name = w2023.city_name AND w2023.document_year = '2023'
  WHERE w2024.document_year = '2024'
)
SELECT city_name,
       warning_increase
FROM diff
WHERE warning_increase > 0
ORDER BY warning_increase DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel est le délai moyen, en jours, entre la création du document et la première occurrence d'un message d'erreur d'extraction, par commune pour 2024 ?
sql:
WITH errors AS (
  SELECT d.city_name,
         d.created_at AS doc_created,
         MIN(er.created_at) AS first_error_time
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error <> ''
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.created_at
)
SELECT city_name,
       ROUND(AVG(julianday(first_error_time) - julianday(doc_created)),2) AS avg_days_to_error
FROM errors
GROUP BY city_name;

question_fr: Quel est le montant total des dépenses (champ D001) pour l'année 2024 ?

question_fr: Combien de documents ont été déposés en 2023, ventilés par type de budget (BP ou BA) ?

question_fr: Quel est le nombre de documents en état « SUCCESS » pour chaque année ?

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes présentant les recettes les plus élevées (champ D002) en 2024 ?

question_fr: Quel pourcentage des résultats d'extraction comporte un avertissement (message_warning) en 2024 ?
sql: WITH total AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024'), with_warning AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(er.message_warning) <> '') SELECT (with_warning.cnt * 100.0) / total.cnt AS warning_percentage FROM total, with_warning;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio dépenses / recettes (D001 / D002) par commune en 2024, et quelles sont les 10 meilleures ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS total_expense, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS total_revenue, (SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END),0)) AS expense_revenue_ratio FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') GROUP BY d.city_name HAVING total_revenue > 0 ORDER BY expense_revenue_ratio DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quel est le taux de croissance des dépenses (D001) entre 2023 et 2024 par commune, pour les communes dont la croissance dépasse 10 % ?
sql: WITH expenses AS (SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS expense_sum FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year) SELECT e2024.city_name, e2023.expense_sum AS expense_2023, e2024.expense_sum AS expense_2024, ((e2024.expense_sum - e2023.expense_sum) / NULLIF(e2023.expense_sum,0)) * 100.0 AS growth_percent FROM expenses e2023 JOIN expenses e2024 ON e2023.city_name = e2024.city_name WHERE e2023.document_year = '2023' AND e2024.document_year = '2024' AND e2023.expense_sum > 0 AND ((e2024.expense_sum - e2023.expense_sum) / e2023.expense_sum) * 100.0 > 10.0 ORDER BY growth_percent DESC;

question_fr: Combien de communes ont des dépenses supérieures à 120 % de leurs recettes en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS communes_over_120_percent FROM ( SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS expense, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS revenue FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') GROUP BY d.city_name HAVING revenue > 0 AND expense > 1.2 * revenue ) sub;

question_fr: Quel est le résultat net (recettes D002 – dépenses D001) de chaque commune en 2024, classé du plus élevé au plus bas ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, (SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) - SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END)) AS net_result FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY net_result DESC;

question_fr: Combien de résultats d'extraction contiennent un message d'erreur en 2024, ventilés par type de masque ?

question_fr: Quel est le score composite de risque (0,6 × croissance des dépenses + 0,4 × taux d'avertissements) par commune, et quelles sont les 10 communes les plus à risque ?
sql: WITH expenses AS (SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS expense_sum FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024') GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year), growth AS (SELECT e2024.city_name, ((e2024.expense_sum - e2023.expense_sum) / NULLIF(e2023.expense_sum,0)) * 100.0 AS growth_percent FROM expenses e2023 JOIN expenses e2024 ON e2023.city_name = e2024.city_name WHERE e2023.document_year = '2023' AND e2024.document_year = '2024' AND e2023.expense_sum > 0), warnings AS (SELECT d.city_name, COUNT(*) AS total_results, SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(er.message_warning) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warning_cnt FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name), risk AS (SELECT g.city_name, g.growth_percent, (w.warning_cnt * 100.0) / NULLIF(w.total_results,0) AS warning_pct FROM growth g JOIN warnings w ON g.city_name = w.city_name) SELECT city_name, (0.6 * growth_percent) + (0.4 * warning_pct) AS composite_risk_score FROM risk ORDER BY composite_risk_score DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent une augmentation continue des dépenses (D001) sur les années 2022, 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH yearly AS (SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS expense_sum FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year IN ('2022','2023','2024') GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year), pivot AS (SELECT y2022.city_name, y2022.expense_sum AS exp_2022, y2023.expense_sum AS exp_2023, y2024.expense_sum AS exp_2024 FROM yearly y2022 JOIN yearly y2023 ON y2022.city_name = y2023.city_name AND y2023.document_year = '2023' JOIN yearly y2024 ON y2022.city_name = y2024.city_name AND y2024.document_year = '2024' WHERE y2022.document_year = '2022') SELECT city_name, exp_2022, exp_2023, exp_2024 FROM pivot WHERE exp_2023 > exp_2022 AND exp_2024 > exp_2023 ORDER BY city_name;

question_fr: Quelle est la médiane des dépenses (champ D001) par commune pour l'année 2024 ?
sql: WITH ordered AS (SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS expense, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY d.city_name ORDER BY CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY d.city_name) AS cnt FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001') SELECT city_name, AVG(expense) AS median_expense FROM ordered WHERE rn IN ((cnt+1)/2, (cnt+2)/2) GROUP BY city_name ORDER BY median_expense DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le délai moyen, en heures, entre la création du document et le lancement de l'extraction pour chaque commune en 2024, et quelles sont les 5 plus longues ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, AVG(strftime('%s', erun.start_time) - strftime('%s', d.created_at)) / 3600.0 AS avg_delay_hours FROM documents d JOIN extraction_runs erun ON erun.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY avg_delay_hours DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quel pourcentage de communes présente un résultat net négatif en 2024 ?
sql: WITH net AS (SELECT d.city_name, (SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) - SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END)) AS net_result FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002') GROUP BY d.city_name) SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN net_result < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*) AS negative_net_percentage FROM net;

question_fr: Combien de documents contiennent au moins un message d'avertissement chaque année ?

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage de documents en état SUCCESS chaque année ?

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec les recettes (champ D002) les plus élevées en 2023 ?

question_fr: Quel est le taux de croissance des dépenses D001 entre 2023 et 2024 par commune, pour les communes dont la hausse dépasse 10 % ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT d.city_name AS commune,
         d.document_year AS annee,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT s2024.commune,
       ((s2024.total_D001 - s2023.total_D001) / NULLIF(s2023.total_D001,0)) * 100.0 AS taux_croissance_pct
FROM sums s2023
JOIN sums s2024 ON s2023.commune = s2024.commune
WHERE s2023.annee = '2023' AND s2024.annee = '2024'
  AND ((s2024.total_D001 - s2023.total_D001) / NULLIF(s2023.total_D001,0)) * 100.0 > 10
ORDER BY taux_croissance_pct DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le ratio dépenses D001 / recettes D002 par commune pour 2024, et quelles sont les 10 meilleures ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT d.city_name AS commune,
         er.safir_field_id AS champ,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_val
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, er.safir_field_id
)
SELECT d1.commune,
       (d1.total_val / NULLIF(d2.total_val,0)) AS ratio_D001_D002
FROM sums d1
JOIN sums d2 ON d1.commune = d2.commune
WHERE d1.champ = 'D001' AND d2.champ = 'D002'
ORDER BY ratio_D001_D002 DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne du nombre de pages pour les documents contenant au moins un message d'erreur, selon le masque ?

SELECT d.mask,
       AVG(d.nb_pages) AS pages_moyennes
FROM documents d

GROUP BY d.mask

question_fr: Quels documents présentent un écart entre la somme des champs D001 et D002 et le champ Total déclaré ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT er.document_id,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS sum_D001,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS sum_D002,
         MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'Total' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS total_field
  FROM extraction_results er
  GROUP BY er.document_id
)
SELECT d.document_id, d.city_name, d.document_year,
       (s.sum_D001 + s.sum_D002) AS somme_D001_D002,
       s.total_field,
       ((s.sum_D001 + s.sum_D002) - s.total_field) AS ecart
FROM sums s
JOIN documents d ON s.document_id = d.document_id
WHERE s.total_field IS NOT NULL
  AND ABS((s.sum_D001 + s.sum_D002) - s.total_field) > 0.01
ORDER BY ecart DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Combien de documents par ville comportent au moins un résultat d'extraction avec avertissement, ventilés par type de budget ?

WITH warned_docs AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT er.document_id
  FROM extraction_results er

)
SELECT d.city_name AS commune,
       d.budget_type,
       COUNT(*) AS nb_documents_avec_avertissement
FROM documents d
JOIN warned_docs w ON d.document_id = w.document_id
GROUP BY d.city_name, d.budget_type
ORDER BY nb_documents_avec_avertissement DESC
LIMIT 20;

question_fr: Quel est le pourcentage d'erreurs (message_error non vide) dans les résultats d'extraction pour chaque année ?

FROM extraction_results er

question_fr: Quels sont les 3 masques avec le plus grand nombre moyen de résultats d'extraction par document ?
sql:
WITH doc_counts AS (
  SELECT d.document_id, d.mask, COUNT(er.result_id) AS nb_results
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  GROUP BY d.document_id, d.mask
)
SELECT mask,
       AVG(nb_results) AS avg_results_par_doc
FROM doc_counts
GROUP BY mask
ORDER BY avg_results_par_doc DESC

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, comment évoluent les dépenses D001 d'une année à l'autre (augmentation, diminution, stable) ?
sql:
WITH yearly AS (
  SELECT d.city_name AS commune,
         d.document_year AS annee,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
trend AS (
  SELECT commune,
         annee,
         total_D001,
         LAG(total_D001) OVER (PARTITION BY commune ORDER BY annee) AS prev_total
  FROM yearly
)
SELECT commune,
       annee,
       total_D001,
       CASE
         WHEN prev_total IS NULL THEN 'N/A'
         WHEN total_D001 > prev_total THEN 'increase'
         WHEN total_D001 < prev_total THEN 'decrease'
         ELSE 'stable'
       END AS trend
FROM trend
ORDER BY commune, annee;

question_fr: Quel score de risque par commune, combinant la croissance des dépenses D001 (2023‑2024) et le taux d'avertissements en 2024, et quelles sont les 10 communes les plus à risque ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT d.city_name AS commune,
         d.document_year AS annee,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
growth AS (
  SELECT s2024.commune,
         ((s2024.total_D001 - s2023.total_D001) / NULLIF(s2023.total_D001,0)) * 100.0 AS growth_pct
  FROM sums s2023
  JOIN sums s2024 ON s2023.commune = s2024.commune
  WHERE s2023.annee = '2023' AND s2024.annee = '2024'
),
warnings AS (
  SELECT d.city_name AS commune,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(er.message_warning) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS nb_warn,
         COUNT(*) AS nb_total
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
risk AS (
  SELECT g.commune,
         g.growth_pct,
         (w.nb_warn * 100.0 / NULLIF(w.nb_total,0)) AS warning_rate_pct,
         (0.6 * g.growth_pct) + (0.4 * (w.nb_warn * 100.0 / NULLIF(w.nb_total,0))) AS risk_score
  FROM growth g
  JOIN warnings w ON g.commune = w.commune
)
SELECT commune,
       growth_pct,
       warning_rate_pct,
       risk_score
FROM risk
ORDER BY risk_score DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont des dépenses D001 supérieures à 120 % des recettes D002 pour une année donnée, et quel est le pourcentage d'excès ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT d.city_name AS commune,
         d.document_year AS annee,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_D001,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_D002
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT commune,
       annee,
       total_D001,
       total_D002,
       (total_D001 / NULLIF(total_D002,0)) * 100.0 AS pourcentage_D001_sur_D002,
       ((total_D001 / NULLIF(total_D002,0)) * 100.0 - 120) AS excess_pct
FROM sums
WHERE total_D002 > 0
  AND (total_D001 / total_D002) > 1.20
ORDER BY pourcentage_D001_sur_D002 DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la médiane des dépenses D001 par commune pour l'année 2024 ?
sql:
WITH vals AS (
  SELECT d.city_name AS commune,
         CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS val,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY d.city_name ORDER BY CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS rn,
         COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY d.city_name) AS cnt
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024'
)
SELECT commune,
       CASE
         WHEN cnt % 2 = 1 THEN
           MAX(CASE WHEN rn = (cnt/2)+1 THEN val END)
         ELSE
           (MAX(CASE WHEN rn = cnt/2 THEN val END) + MAX(CASE WHEN rn = cnt/2 + 1 THEN val END)) / 2.0
       END AS median_D001
FROM vals
GROUP BY commune
HAVING cnt > 0
ORDER BY median_D001 DESC
LIMIT 20;

question_fr: Quel est le délai moyen, en heures, entre la création du document et le lancement de l'extraction, selon le masque, et quels masques affichent le plus grand délai moyen ?
sql:
WITH delays AS (
  SELECT d.mask,
         (JULIANDAY(er.start_time) - JULIANDAY(d.created_at)) * 24.0 AS delay_hours
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_runs er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE er.start_time IS NOT NULL AND d.created_at IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT mask,
       AVG(delay_hours) AS moyenne_delai_heures
FROM delays
GROUP BY mask
ORDER BY moyenne_delai_heures DESC;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leurs dépenses (D001) croître de plus de 15 % entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH dep AS (
  SELECT d.city_name AS commune,
         d.document_year AS annee,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_dep
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
)
SELECT c2024.commune,
       ((c2024.total_dep - c2023.total_dep) / NULLIF(c2023.total_dep,0)) * 100.0 AS croissance_pct
FROM dep c2023
JOIN dep c2024 ON c2023.commune = c2024.commune
WHERE c2023.annee = '2023' AND c2024.annee = '2024'

question_fr: Quel est le résultat net (recettes – dépenses) par commune en 2024, et quelles sont les 5 communes les plus positives ?

WITH agg AS (

         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS net_resultat,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS depenses
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id

question_fr: Quelles communes ont des dépenses supérieures à 110 % de leurs recettes en 2024 ?

WITH agg AS (

         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS depenses,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT commune, depenses, recettes,
       ROUND(100.0 * depenses / NULLIF(recettes,0),2) AS pct_dep_rec

question_fr: Quel est le score de risque composite (0,6 × croissance dépenses + 0,4 × taux d'avertissements) par commune, et quelles sont les 5 communes les plus à risque ?
sql:
WITH dep AS (
  SELECT d.city_name AS commune,
         d.document_year AS annee,
         SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_dep
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
  GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
growth AS (
  SELECT c2024.commune,
         ((c2024.total_dep - c2023.total_dep) / NULLIF(c2023.total_dep,0)) * 100.0 AS croissance_pct
  FROM dep c2023
  JOIN dep c2024 ON c2023.commune = c2024.commune
  WHERE c2023.annee = '2023' AND c2024.annee = '2024'
),
warnings AS (
  SELECT d.city_name AS commune,
         COUNT(*) AS nb_warn,
         COUNT(DISTINCT er.result_id) AS nb_total
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(er.message_warning) <> ''
    AND d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
score AS (
  SELECT g.commune,
         g.croissance_pct,
         w.nb_warn,
         w.nb_total,
         (0.6 * g.croissance_pct) + (0.4 * (w.nb_warn * 100.0 / NULLIF(w.nb_total,0))) AS risk_score
  FROM growth g
  LEFT JOIN warnings w ON g.commune = w.commune
)
SELECT commune,
       ROUND(croissance_pct,2) AS croissance_pct,
       ROUND(nb_warn * 100.0 / NULLIF(nb_total,0),2) AS taux_avertissements_pct,
       ROUND(risk_score,2) AS score_risque
FROM score
ORDER BY risk_score DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles anomalies existent où la somme dépenses (D001) + recettes (D002) diffère de plus de 5 % du total déclaré (champ Total) pour l'année 2024 ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
  SELECT d.document_id,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS dep,
         SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS rec,
         MAX(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'Total' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) END) AS total_declared
  FROM extraction_results er
  JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
  WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.document_id
)
SELECT document_id,
       dep, rec, total_declared,
       ROUND(100.0 * ABS((dep + rec) - total_declared) / NULLIF(total_declared,0),2) AS ecart_pct
FROM sums
WHERE total_declared IS NOT NULL
  AND ABS((dep + rec) - total_declared) > 0.05 * total_declared
ORDER BY ecart_pct DESC
LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu leurs dépenses augmenter chaque année de 2022 à 2024 ?

WITH dep AS (

WITH vals AS (

  FROM extraction_results er

question_fr: Quel est le résultat net (recettes D002 – dépenses D001) par commune pour 2023 et 2024, et comment a‑t‑il évolué entre ces deux années ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
    SELECT d.city_name,
           d.document_year,
           SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS sum_d001,
           SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS sum_d002
    FROM extraction_results er
    JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
      AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002')
    GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
net AS (
    SELECT city_name,
           document_year,
           sum_d002 - sum_d001 AS net_result
    FROM sums
)
SELECT n2024.city_name,
       n2023.net_result AS net_2023,
       n2024.net_result AS net_2024,
       (n2024.net_result - n2023.net_result) AS change
FROM net n2024
JOIN net n2023 ON n2024.city_name = n2023.city_name
WHERE n2024.document_year = '2024' AND n2023.document_year = '2023'
ORDER BY change DESC;

question_fr: Quelles communes ont vu le nombre d'avertissements d'extraction augmenter de plus de 20 % entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH warnings AS (
    SELECT d.city_name,
           d.document_year,
           COUNT(*) AS warning_cnt
    FROM extraction_results er
    JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE er.message_warning IS NOT NULL
      AND TRIM(er.message_warning) <> ''
      AND d.document_year IN ('2023','2024')
    GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year
),
pivot AS (
    SELECT w2024.city_name,
           w2023.warning_cnt AS cnt_2023,
           w2024.warning_cnt AS cnt_2024
    FROM warnings w2024
    JOIN warnings w2023 ON w2024.city_name = w2023.city_name
    WHERE w2024.document_year = '2024' AND w2023.document_year = '2023'
)
SELECT city_name,
       cnt_2023,
       cnt_2024,
       ROUND(100.0 * (cnt_2024 - cnt_2023) / NULLIF(cnt_2023,0), 2) AS pct_increase
FROM pivot
WHERE cnt_2023 > 0
  AND (cnt_2024 - cnt_2023) * 100.0 / cnt_2023 > 20
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC;

question_fr: Quels sont les 5 masques qui affichent la plus grande moyenne de résultats d'extraction par document ?

WITH doc_counts AS (

           d.mask,
           COUNT(er.result_id) AS result_cnt
    FROM documents d
    LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    GROUP BY d.document_id, d.mask
),
mask_avg AS (
    SELECT mask,
           AVG(result_cnt) AS avg_results_per_doc
    FROM doc_counts
    GROUP BY mask
)
SELECT mask,
       ROUND(avg_results_per_doc,2) AS avg_results_per_doc
FROM mask_avg
ORDER BY avg_results_per_doc DESC

question_fr: Quelles communes ont des dépenses (D001) supérieures à 110 % de leurs recettes (D002) en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH sums AS (
    SELECT d.city_name,
           SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS sum_d001,
           SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS sum_d002
    FROM extraction_results er
    JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id
    WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
      AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001','D002')
    GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT city_name,
       sum_d001,
       sum_d002,

question_fr: Quel pourcentage des documents est en état VALIDATED chaque année ?

question_fr: Quelles communes affichent une hausse de leurs dépenses (champ D001) supérieure à 10 % entre 2023 et 2024, tout en ayant au moins un avertissement dans les documents de 2024 ?
sql:
WITH success_docs AS (
    SELECT d.document_id, d.city_name, d.document_year, d.warning_message
    FROM documents d
    JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id
    WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS'
),
expenses AS (
    SELECT sd.city_name,
           sd.document_year,
           CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS expense,
           sd.warning_message
    FROM success_docs sd
    JOIN extraction_results er ON er.document_id = sd.document_id
    WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND er.value <> ''
),
warnings_2024 AS (
    SELECT sd.city_name,
           sd.document_year,
           SUM(CASE WHEN sd.warning_message <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warning_cnt
    FROM success_docs sd
    WHERE sd.document_year = '2024'
    GROUP BY sd.city_name, sd.document_year
)
SELECT e2024.city_name,
       e2024.expense AS expense_2024,
       e2023.expense AS expense_2023,
       ROUND((e2024.expense - e2023.expense) / NULLIF(e2023.expense, 0) * 100, 2) AS growth_percent,
       w.warning_cnt AS warnings_2024
FROM expenses e2024
JOIN expenses e2023
  ON e2023.city_name = e2024.city_name
 AND e2023.document_year = '2023'
JOIN warnings_2024 w
  ON w.city_name = e2024.city_name
WHERE e2024.document_year = '2024'
GROUP BY e2024.city_name, e2024.expense, e2023.expense, w.warning_cnt
HAVING growth_percent > 10
ORDER BY growth_percent DESC
LIMIT 10;
